omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Information you give us. This is information about you that you give us by: filling in forms on the DAZN Service or on our websites (our “Sites”); registering to use our DAZN Service; using the DAZN Service; entering a competition, promotion or survey; and/or corresponding with us by phone, e-mail or otherwise. This information may include your name, address, e-mail address, phone number, date of birth, debit/credit card information, other payment and financial information, personal description and/or photograph.
